description:
Pre-cleanup, baselines, and device aggregation
Clean up any existing SnapVX sessions, define the custom RUL file, pick an online EM director, capture baseline Symmetrix errors, and merge all target device lists into a single all_tdevs working set.
plain_value_text:
Pre-cleanup, baselines, and device aggregation
Clean up any existing SnapVX sessions, define the custom RUL file, pick an online EM director, capture baseline Symmetrix errors, and merge all target device lists into a single all_tdevs working set.

description:
Zero-pattern writes + “zero reclaim” deallocation validation
Define a COPA workload that writes a zero pattern, run COPA I/O across all_tdevs, poll for no write pending, wait briefly, then deallocate using “ZERO RECLAIM (No Data Loss)”. Extract one TDEV and query THIN status via inline to confirm the post-deallocation allocation reflects the expected “zero allocation” condition.
plain_value_text:
Zero-pattern writes + “zero reclaim” deallocation validation
Define a COPA workload that writes a zero pattern, run COPA I/O across all_tdevs, poll for no write pending, wait briefly, then deallocate using “ZERO RECLAIM (No Data Loss)”. Extract one TDEV and query THIN status via inline to confirm the post-deallocation allocation reflects the expected “zero allocation” condition.

description:
Storage group rebuild and SRP/SLO association with compression enabled
Remove device associations for all involved device lists, create three storage groups (DL0, DL1, DL2) and add the paired device lists (including before/after mezz lists), pick a random SRP and random SLO, associate the SGs to SRP/SLO, enable SG compression on all three, wait, and verify compression is enabled.
plain_value_text:
Storage group rebuild and SRP/SLO association with compression enabled
Remove device associations for all involved device lists, create three storage groups (DL0, DL1, DL2) and add the paired device lists (including before/after mezz lists), pick a random SRP and random SLO, associate the SGs to SRP/SLO, enable SG compression on all three, wait, and verify compression is enabled.

description:
Mezzanine disable scenario: verify work shifts to QAT and ECHO/MEZZ counters stop increasing
Write compressed data and run background random workload, capture HW compression state and ECHO (A1/E1/6F) + QAT (A1/E1/6E) counters, stop all MEZZ engines (@HWCOMPR STOPALL MEZZ), reset stats, re-check HW state and capture QAT command/counter activity, then stop workload(s), read-verify the previously written data, generate more compressed writes, and assert QAT-related counters/commands increase while ECHO/MEZZ counters do not.
plain_value_text:
Mezzanine disable scenario: verify work shifts to QAT and ECHO/MEZZ counters stop increasing
Write compressed data and run background random workload, capture HW compression state and ECHO (A1/E1/6F) + QAT (A1/E1/6E) counters, stop all MEZZ engines (@HWCOMPR STOPALL MEZZ), reset stats, re-check HW state and capture QAT command/counter activity, then stop workload(s), read-verify the previously written data, generate more compressed writes, and assert QAT-related counters/commands increase while ECHO/MEZZ counters do not.

description:
Mezzanine enable scenario + final error analysis and cleanup
Re-initialize/enable MEZZ engines (@HWCOMPR INITALL MEZZ), run additional workloads and compressed writes, verify HW compression state and ECHO counters now increase again, stop all workloads and active I/O, collect differential errors and analyze with the custom RUL file, then perform cleanup by removing/restoring device associations and deleting the created storage groups.
plain_value_text:
Mezzanine enable scenario + final error analysis and cleanup
Re-initialize/enable MEZZ engines (@HWCOMPR INITALL MEZZ), run additional workloads and compressed writes, verify HW compression state and ECHO counters now increase again, stop all workloads and active I/O, collect differential errors and analyze with the custom RUL file, then perform cleanup by removing/restoring device associations and deleting the created storage groups.
